title: Who won Grammy Awards for 2026? See the full winners list - CBS News
text:
2026 Grammy Awards: Song of the Year Winner

Billie Eilsch claimed the Song of the Year award at the 68th Grammy Awards ceremony held Sunday at Crypto.com Arena in Los Angeles.

Eilsch and her collaborator Finneas O'Connell won for writing "WILDFLOWER," which was performed by Billie Eilsch. The track beat out several other notable nominations in this category.

Other contenders included Lady Gaga's "Abracadabra," Bad Bunny's "DtMF," and Kendrick Lamar's "luther," among others. The award recognizes excellence in songwriting rather than performance, highlighting the creative craftsmanship behind the composition.
